debug_info.goal:
x y z w : ℕ
ht : 1 < x ∧ 1 < y ∧ 1 < z
hw : 0 ≤ w
h0 : Real.log ↑w / Real.log ↑x = 24
h1 : Real.log ↑w / Real.log ↑y = 40
h2 : Real.log ↑w / Real.log (↑x * ↑y * ↑z) = 12
⊢ Real.log ↑w / Real.log ↑z = 60

proof:
have hx : 1 < (x : ℝ) := Nat.one_lt_cast.mpr ht.1
  have hy : 1 < (y : ℝ) := Nat.one_lt_cast.mpr ht.2.1
  have hz : 1 < (z : ℝ) := Nat.one_lt_cast.mpr ht.2.2
  have hxne : (x : ℝ) ≠ 0 := by positivity
  have hyne : (y : ℝ) ≠ 0 := by positivity
  have hzne : (z : ℝ) ≠ 0 := by positivity
  have hlogx : Real.log (x : ℝ) ≠ 0 := Real.log_ne_zero_of_pos_of_ne_one (by positivity) (by linarith)
  have hlogy : Real.log (y : ℝ) ≠ 0 := Real.log_ne_zero_of_pos_of_ne_one (by positivity) (by linarith)
  have hlogz : Real.log (z : ℝ) ≠ 0 := Real.log_ne_zero_of_pos_of_ne_one (by positivity) (by linarith)
  rw [Real.log_mul (by positivity : (x : ℝ) * y ≠ 0) hzne, 
      Real.log_mul hxne hyne] at h2
  field_simp [hlogx, hlogy, hlogz] at h0 h1 h2 ⊢
  linarith
